+  if (lower.startsWith('zai/')) {
+    const model = trimmed.slice('zai/'.length).trim()
+    if (model.length === 0) {
+      throw new Error('Invalid model id: zai/… is missing the model id')
+    }
+    return {
+      kind: 'fixed',
+      transport: 'native',
+      userModelId: `zai/${model}`,
+      llmModelId: `openai/${model}`,
